summerhill-fine-homes.name: Summerhill Fine Homes
summerhill-fine-homes.summary: Summerhill Fine Homes is a custom home builder operating on the Sunshine Coast in British Columbia, Canada.
summerhill-fine-homes.relationship: Matt Anthony has provided ongoing architectural photography services for Summerhill, helping them build their visual brand through project shoots, team content, and award-winning imagery.

balmoral-construction.name: Balmoral Construction
balmoral-construction.summary: Balmoral Construction is a construction company based in Whistler, BC. They specialize in high-end construction projects in the Whistler area.
balmoral-construction.relationship: Matt Anthony Photography worked with Balmoral Construction on comprehensive visual documentation, providing project photography and supporting a full website rebuild through strategic visual content.

sitelines-architecture.name: Sitelines Architecture
sitelines-architecture.summary: Sitelines Architecture is an architectural firm specializing in residential and commercial projects across British Columbia. They designed the notable 25,000+ sq ft SDA BC mass timber headquarters.
sitelines-architecture.relationship: Matt Anthony has documented Sitelines Architecture's residential and commercial projects throughout BC, providing architectural photography services for their portfolio.
projects_together: SDA BC mass timber headquarters (25,000+ sq ft)

the-window-merchant.name: The Window Merchant
the-window-merchant.summary: The Window Merchant is a window and door specialist company that underwent a complete brand transformation through creative content services.
the-window-merchant.relationship: Matt Anthony worked with The Window Merchant on a creative retainer that included consistent photography, video, social media management, and a complete website redesign.

lrd-studio.name: LRD Studio
lrd-studio.summary: LRD Studio is an award-winning interior design studio based in Whistler, BC, specializing in high-end residential renovations and design projects.
lrd-studio.relationship: Matt Anthony provided architectural photography services to help LRD Studio build a publication-ready visual portfolio across their renovation projects.
